arguments.command:
python - <<'PY'
import requests,re,json
url='https://builderz.dev/work'
html=requests.get(url,timeout=20).text
print('len',len(html))
for pat in ['project','portfolio','case','work','title']:
    print(pat, html.lower().count(pat))
# print possible nextjs data script urls
for m in re.findall(r'/_next/static/[^"\']+', html):
    print(m)
# look for __NEXT_DATA__
m=re.search(r'<script id="__NEXT_DATA__" type="application/json">(.*?)</script>',html)
print('nextdata',bool(m))
if m:
    data=json.loads(m.group(1))
    print(data.keys())
    print(str(data)[:500])
open('/tmp/work.html','w',encoding='utf-8').write(html)
PY
